# tests/fixtures

Static demo certificates referenced from the project README's Demo block.

These are self-signed, throwaway certs with public-key material only — never
private keys. Generated once for documentation reproducibility; not part of the
regression suite (the conftest generates ephemeral certs for tests).

## Files
- `rsa-2048.pem` — demo RSA-2048 self-signed cert, CN=demo.qtonicquantum.example
